items.title: Azure connection mapping migrates; PAT status endpoint responds
items.expected: 0003_azure applies; status endpoint returns the envelope (unmapped/disconnected when no PAT/mapping)
items.evidence: Verified live: 0003_azure applied; GET /api/azure/status returned a typed envelope (no active project -> typed error).

items.title: Git history/status for the active project
items.precondition: A project selected that is a git repo
items.expected: Branch/status and commit list returned; no active project yields a clean typed error
items.evidence: Verified live (no-active-project path): GET /api/git/status returned GIT_NO_ACTIVE_PROJECT typed error. Full history needs a selected repo (exercised via the picker).
items.notes: git invoked via execFile with argv + cwd (no shell) — verified in GitService.

items.title: PAT stored in keychain only; never in DB/logs/responses
steps: 1. Set a PAT via the settings endpoint
2. Inspect DB rows, server logs, and the status response
items.expected: PAT present only in the OS keychain; only a connected/expired status crosses to the frontend
items.notes: SecretService is keytar-only and azure_connections stores no secret (verified in code). Live keychain write needs an operator machine + a real PAT.

items.title: Azure PR list + detail render; create PR opens a real PR
items.precondition: Valid PAT + a project mapped to an Azure repo
steps: 3. View PR list + a PR detail (threads/votes/files)
items.expected: Live PRs render; created PR appears in Azure; expired PAT shows a reconnect prompt (401)
items.notes: Requires a real Azure DevOps PAT and repo; cannot be exercised in CI. azureClient pins api-version=7.1 and redacts the PAT from errors (verified in code).
